{{Quote|…a planet that has three suns. There can't be many systems like that—in fact, only one. Riflor.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Republic 62">[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]]</ref>}}
The '''Riflorii system''' was a trinary [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Narrant sector/Legends|Narrant sector]], around which the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Riflor/Legends|Riflor]] orbited.

{{System-stub}}
